notes: LDC conversational telephone corpus; the clearest non-public ingredient in the released recipe.
Open Mozilla crowd corpus; later Common Voice releases may be materially larger.
Public audiobook and read-speech corpus; full Spanish branch appears larger than the NVIDIA-used subset.
Public European Parliament speech; official dataset is larger than the slice NVIDIA used.
Useful prepared-speech supplement, but the noncommercial/no-derivatives license needs review before training use.

dataset_name: Crowdsourced Argentinian Spanish Speech Data Set (OpenSLR 61)
notes: Useful accent-diversity supplement with no clean public hour total on the official page.

dataset_name: Crowdsourced Venezuelan Spanish Speech Data Set (OpenSLR 75)
notes: Useful Latin American accent supplement, though the official page surfaces archive sizes more clearly than hours.
Small public media-speech benchmark; better for robustness checks than bulk recipe replacement.
Strong multilingual benchmark and evaluation corpus for Spanish, but too small to matter for training scale.
Licensed conversational telephone Spanish; useful if closer telephony-domain evaluation or adaptation is needed.
Licensed telephone-speech supplement that is closer to Fisher's domain than open read-speech alternatives.
Buyable conversational Spanish smartphone corpus; more spontaneous than read prompts but still not identical to Fisher telephony.

dataset_name: Spanish Speech Data by Mobile Phone - 435 Hours (ELRA-S0447)
notes: Large commercial Spanish mobile-speech option that is useful for scale, not literal recipe matching.
